task_completion.description: Verify the Contact record's basic information has been anonymized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CRM Contact record where the First Name is 'GDPR', Last Name is 'Anonymized', Primary Email is 'gdpr@anonymized.local', and Phone is '0000000000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Contact record's Mailing Address fields have been cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Mailing Address section of the Contact record and ensure all fields (e.g., street, city, state, zip, country) are completely empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the Contact record has 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call' enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkboxes or toggle fields labeled 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call' on the Contact record and ensure they are checked or set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required GDPR comment was added to the Contact record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a description, notes, or comments field on the Contact record containing the exact text: 'GDPR Right to be Forgotten executed.'

task_completion.description: Verify the Lead record's basic information has been anonymized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CRM Lead record where the First Name is 'GDPR', Last Name is 'Anonymized', Primary Email is 'gdpr@anonymized.local', and Phone is '0000000000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lead record has 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call' enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkboxes or toggle fields labeled 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call' on the Lead record and ensure they are checked or set to 'Yes'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CRM graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating a CRM application (like Salesforce, SuiteCRM, etc.), not a terminal window executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent edited the existing records rather than deleting them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for edit screens or save confirmation messages. There should be no evidence of 'Delete' buttons being clicked or 'Record Deleted' confirmation messages.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the actual form fields of the CRM system, not a notepad, text editor, or a spoofed HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required anonymization values are strictly verified: First Name must be 'GDPR', Last Name must be 'Anonymized', Email must be 'gdpr@anonymized.local', and Phone must be '0000000000'. The exact comment to be added to the Contact record is: 'GDPR Right to be Forgotten executed.'
